[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person in a dark hoodie walks through a covered parking garage corridor while looking to the side.

The main subject is a person viewed from behind and slightly to the side, wearing a dark, loose hooded sweatshirt and dark shorts. The person’s hood is down, their hair is dark and fluffy, and they raise one hand near their face as if touching or adjusting something while walking forward.

The setting is an indoor parking garage with concrete floors and a low ceiling. Overhead, a grid of pipes and metal beams runs across the top of the frame, with bright rectangular ceiling lights lining the corridor. Parking spaces and parked cars are visible along the right side, and a concrete support column is visible on the left. The lighting is cool and fluorescent, creating a bright, evenly lit background with some reflections on the floor.

Visual details include a wide-angle, slightly low camera perspective from near the ground behind the person. The person occupies the left-middle foreground, with motion blur suggesting movement. The background shows multiple cars parked in rows to the right, distant pedestrians walking further down the corridor, and yellow-and-black curb markings near the left column.

Visible Text: No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary: The image shows a person walking through a lit underground parking garage corridor. Cars are parked along the sides and other people are visible far ahead in the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text detected.]

# Structured Version

- None

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to show a person in a parking garage with cars and overhead lighting, but there is no visible, legible text to extract.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair is captured from behind, walking away from the camera in a dimly lit, underground parking garage. He is wearing a dark grey, oversized hooded sweatshirt and black shorts. His right hand is raised to his face, obscuring part of his profile. The parking garage has a rough concrete ceiling with exposed pipes and fluorescent lighting that casts long shadows. Large, cylindrical concrete pillars support the ceiling, some with red markings. To the left, a dark-colored SUV is parked. The floor is concrete, showing signs of wear and some damp patches. In the background, several other people are walking further into the garage, and more cars are parked in the distance. The overall color palette is muted, dominated by grays, blacks, and the cool white of the artificial lights. The mood is somewhat solitary and urban, with a sense of movement and anonymity. The image has a slightly grainy, naturalistic quality, as if taken with a smartphone in low light.
